metadata.name: polyguard_market
metadata.description: Polyguard Market Factory - Prediction market creation and resolution

instructions.name: create_multisig
docs: Create a new multisig for admin operations

instructions.name: file_dispute
docs: File a dispute against a market resolution

instructions.name: manage_oracle
docs: Add or remove an oracle from the registry

instructions.name: mint_outcome_tokens
docs: Mints outcome tokens (YES/NO) in exchange for collateral

instructions.name: redeem_outcome_tokens
docs: Redeems outcome tokens for collateral (before resolution)

instructions.name: refund_cancelled
docs: Refunds collateral for cancelled markets (burns paired YES+NO tokens)

instructions.name: resolve_market
docs: Resolves a market with the final outcome

instructions.name: resume_market
docs: Resumes trading on a paused market

instructions.name: set_enforce_validation
docs: Enable or disable oracle validation enforcement

instructions.name: submit_dispute_vote
docs: Submit oracle vote on a dispute

instructions.name: withdraw_fees
docs: Withdraws accumulated fees with protocol/creator split

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller - must be either market authority (creator) or protocol treasury owner

types.name: Dispute
docs: A dispute against a market resolution

fields.name: original_oracle
docs: Original oracle that resolved the market

fields.name: first_submission_at
docs: First oracle submission timestamp (for reveal delay)

types.name: FeeRecipient
docs: Fee recipient type for split withdrawals

fields.name: protocol_fee_share_bps
docs: Protocol's share of fees in basis points (e.g., 2000 = 20% of total fee)
Remaining (10000 - protocol_fee_share_bps) goes to market creator

fields.name: protocol_treasury
docs: Protocol treasury address for fee collection

fields.name: threshold
docs: Number of signatures required to execute

types.name: OracleInfo
docs: Oracle information with weight and status

types.name: OracleRegistry
docs: Oracle Registry - stores list of approved oracles for market resolution

fields.name: oracles
docs: List of approved oracles with metadata

fields.name: enforce_validation
docs: Whether to enforce oracle validation (can be disabled for testing)
